settings.title: You can't build the Machine before the Story is fixed.

settings.editor: “We Discover your Story. We build your Assets. We create your Machine. In that order. Always. Because the sequence is the strategy.”

settings.html:
Story — Discover the Message

Fix the positioning. Remove the confusion. Build the message that makes buyers choose you on value instead of defaulting to price. Every engagement starts here. Every single one.

  • Brand narrative and sales messaging guide
  • EPIC Framework applied to your ICP
  • Elevator pitch and executive story
  • Competitive differentiation map
  • SDI scoring across five dimensions
Why you can't skip this

Every Asset you produce carries your Story. If the Story is wrong, the Asset amplifies the confusion. Every dollar spent on video or automation before the Story is fixed is a dollar making the wrong thing louder.

Entry Point

The free Sales Message Diagnosis is the S audit. 30 minutes. Five deliverables. The real problem surfaces here.

Book Your Free Diagnosis

Assets — Build the Stage

The Story needs a vehicle. Hollywood-grade films, decks, and sales content that carry the message into every room where a buying decision gets made. Assets are only as good as the Story they carry.

  • Hollywood-grade brand film
  • Explainer video (under 2 minutes)
  • Sales deck built for the room where deals close
  • Email sequences and one-pagers
  • Culture and values video for recruiting
Why you can't skip Story to get here

No film, deck, or content piece fixes a broken message. It amplifies it. Every asset we produce is built on a Story that's already been diagnosed and confirmed. That's the standard. No exceptions.

See the Work

1,000+ brand campaigns for Cisco, Deloitte, Stanford, Kaiser Permanente, and more.

View Portfolio

Machine — Create the Pipeline

AI agents. Automated prospecting, personalization, and follow-up built on top of a Story that already works. The Machine is the third floor. It only stands because the foundation exists.

  • Pre-call intelligence agents
  • Anonymous visitor identification
  • Outbound personalization at the account level
  • Call transcript analysis and objection mapping
  • Market trigger monitoring (funding, hiring, tech stack)
  • Webinar follow-up and re-engagement sequences
Why you can't skip Story and Assets to get here

Automation is a multiplier. It multiplies whatever you load into it. A confused message sent to 10,000 people is confusion at scale. The sequence always wins.

Live Right Now

These agents are running in production — not demos, not concepts.

See the Full Service

settings.title: Every company is somewhere different in SAM.

settings.editor: Start where the problem is. The entry points are different. The sequence is the same.

Your competitors are using AI. So is every vendor pitching your buyers. The question is whether you know how to cut through it or add to the noise.

Maury trains executive teams and sales organizations to find their story, speak the right language, and use AI to scale what works.

• ✓AI Fluency workshops for executives and leadership teams
  • ✓EPIC Framework training for sales teams (live or virtual)
  • ✓SAM System sales narrative workshop
  • ✓LinkedIn Learning course access
  • ✓Corporate licensing of the EPIC Framework
Best for: Companies that want their team trained, not a vendor doing it for them.

settings.title: Find the leak. Fix the message.

settings.editor:
You already know something is off. Deals take too long. Buyers ghost after demos. Everyone sounds like everyone else. The problem is you’re too close to see it.

Maury comes in, finds the real story problem, and gives you a clear path forward. No fluff. No six-month retainer to get to an answer.

• ✓Sales Message Diagnosis — the S audit
  • ✓SDI scoring across five differentiation dimensions
  • ✓Sales Story Sprint — positioning and messaging
  • ✓Fractional CMO advisory and ongoing strategy
  • ✓Positioning & go-to-market strategy
Best for: Companies that know they have a story problem and want clarity before committing to production.

settings.title: We build it. You run it.

settings.editor:
You know the problem. You’ve seen the results. Now you want the full system built and running.

The team handles everything: the story, the Hollywood-grade content, and the AI pipeline that keeps it working. Ninety days. One sequence. Done.

• ✓Full SAM System — Story, Assets, and Machine
  • ✓90-day Greenlight execution program
  • ✓Hollywood-grade brand film and supporting content
  • ✓AI agent builds — prospecting, personalization, follow-up
  • ✓Done-for-you implementation and handoff
Best for: Companies ready to stop iterating and start scaling.

settings.editor: You cannot build Assets without a Story worth producing. This is where we discover what makes you unmistakably different and why buyers should choose you on value.

• →Brand narrative and positioning guide
  • →EPIC Framework — Empathy, Problem, Impact, Change — applied to your ICP
  • →Elevator pitch and executive story script
  • →Sales messaging guide for rep consistency
  • →SDI scoring across five differentiation dimensions

Free Entry Point

The Sales Message Diagnosis is the S audit. 30 minutes. No charge. The real problem surfaces here — which is why it’s limited to 8 per month.

✗ Before Story

✗Every rep tells a different story in every meeting
✗Buyers go quiet after the demo
✗Deals stall on price because value wasn't established
✗Marketing and sales tell different stories
✗You sound like your competition
✗New reps take 6+ months to find their pitch
✗Automation amplifies confusion instead of closing deals

✓ After Story

✓One clear message, consistent across every channel
✓Buyers self-qualify and arrive pre-sold on your value
✓Conversations move to terms, not back to justification
✓Marketing and sales speak the same language
✓You are unmistakably different in a crowded market
✓New reps are confident and consistent in 30 days
✓Automation scales the right message and drives pipeline

settings.title: Machine — The Pipeline That Runs Itself

settings.editor: AI agents built on top of Assets that are already working. Not demos. Not concepts. Running in production.

• →Pre-call intelligence — trigger-based account research before every conversation
  • →Anonymous visitor identification — know who’s on your site before they raise their hand
  • →Outbound personalization — account-level opening lines, not name-swap templates
  • →Call transcript analysis — turn every recording into objection data
  • →Market trigger monitoring — funding rounds, leadership changes, tech stack shifts
  • →Webinar follow-up automation — right message, right timing, right account
